title: Cursor Pagination, Ordering, Filters, and Snapshot Behavior · Execution Trace: Feed Go Total Order
summary: Entry lists use offset only, equal timestamps reorder, inserts create duplicates between pages, cursor fields are trusted, filters bypass indexes, and end boundaries are ambiguous. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
